ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group classification of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's geographical center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's geographical center */,
  "land_area_sqkm" REAL /* Total land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "government" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "forest_area" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "forest_area_sqkm" REAL /* Forest area in square kilometers */,
  "total_area_sq_mi" REAL /* Total area of the country in square miles */,
  "percent_forest" REAL /* Percentage of forest cover in the country */,
  "forest_type" TEXT /* Type of forest (e.g., tropical, subtropical, temperate) */,
  "primary_forest_area" REAL /* Primary forest area in square kilometers */,
  "planted_forest_area" REAL /* Planted forest area in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "total_area_sqkm" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income group */,
  "income_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the income group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income group */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the income group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, general user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Specific data requested by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries_income_group" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code as a foreign key */,
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Income group identifier as a foreign key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries_region" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code as a foreign key */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region identifier as a foreign key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forest_area_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "forest_area_sqkm" REAL /* Forest area in square kilometers */,
  "total_area_sq_mi" REAL /* Total area of the country in square miles */,
  "percent_forest" REAL /* Percentage of forest cover in the country */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in forest area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forest_area_history_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained within the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the imported data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
